questions.question: Describe the difference between a D-type flip-flop and a J-K flip-flop. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Explain the internal circuitry and truth table of each flip-flop type

questions.question: What is the purpose of the clock signal in a digital circuit? Explain how it affects the operation of the flip-flops.
questions.hint: Focus on the basics of clock signal and its impact on flip-flop operation

questions.question: Draw a simplified diagram of a D-type flip-flop circuit. Label all the components and explain the function of each.
questions.hint: Use basic digital logic components such as AND, OR, and NOT gates
